title: crotalaria scabra
intro: Crotalaria scabra, also known as the rough rattlebox, is a plant species belonging to the legume family. Traditionally, it is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Crotalaria scabra include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels. In herbal preparations, Crotalaria scabra is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, although its use should be carefully considered due to potential toxicity and side effects.
